seoTitle: South Bowenfels vs South Coogee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Bowenfels and South Coogee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Bowenfels vs South Coogee: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Bowenfels and South Coogee.
heading: South Bowenfels vs South Coogee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Bowenfels, New South Wales and South Coogee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Bowenfels has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to South Coogee (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Bowenfels or South Coogee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Bowenfels has a flood risk score of 30/100, while South Coogee scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Bowenfels scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. South Coogee scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Bowenfels or South Coogee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Bowenfels has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
